goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The final failure is positional, not product behavior. The complementary Recent history contains exactly two visible confirmed-deduction entries; exact visible count two is stronger than page-wide first visibility.

worker_package.objective: Replace only the final history assertion with exact visible count two in the complementary region, then complete integrated/disposable-DB gates.
verify: Require old-spec source/mirror pre-hash A48CE49715EB0FFDCBDFD1C7BAC59F46ED5648E913499119D310A69C06ED0690 and protected hashes.
Replace only page-wide .first visibility with complementary exact text, visible:true, toHaveCount(2); no positional/broad/CSS/force.
Preserve everything else and 180s; run scoped format/lint and mirror hash.
Run fresh complete integrated workflow with all 400/350/50/provenance/manual/intake/FEFO/history, two axe, five screenshots, responsive, no errors.
Release port, disposable migrate/dbcheck, final diff/status/protected hashes.
stop_if: Pre-hash differs or any change beyond one assertion is required.
Visible history count differs from two or assertion semantics weaken.
Integrated flow fails twice or any protected artifact changes.

evidence: API assertions already prove two linked events.
Accessibility snapshot shows exactly two visible Recent history entries.
Page-wide first selected a hidden per-batch duplicate.

parallel_safety.rationale: One integrated mirror/DB/artifact/port lifecycle must be serial.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
